name: OKMIN RESOURCES, INC.
business: Okmin Resources, Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration and development of oil and gas properties, mineral rights and other natural resource assets. The company's initial projects are located in Oklahoma and Kansas, and it sells oil and natural gas production to competing buyers.

exposures.sentence: Okmin Resources, Inc. (collectively with its subsidiaries, Okmin or the Company ) was incorporated in Nevada in December 2020 to engage in the business of the acquisition, exploration and development of oil and gas properties, mineral rights and other natural resource assets.

catalysts.event: Convertible note settled by issuing common shares
catalysts.sentence: On September 19, 2025, the Company issued 6,503,024 common shares to the noteholder to settle the note in full.
